publicationStmt.publisher: manuscripta.se: A Digital Catalogue of Medieval and Early Modern Manuscripts in Sweden

msDesc.head: Johan Peringskiöld, Monumenta Sveo-Gothorum. 9. Västergötland, Skåne, Halland, Blekinge

p.origDate: 17th century, last quarter, or 18th century, first quarter (before 1720)
